```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#3A7DC9;background:#DCE9FA;padding:0.25em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">Layer 06 · Constraint &amp; Recovery</span>
  <div style="margin-top:0.55em;font-size:0.7em;color:#2C3E50;">A mature Harness must include <span style="color:#3A7DC9;font-weight:700;">three things</span>:</div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:center;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.85em 1em;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(212,95,71,0.15);border-top:5px solid #D45F47;">
   <div style="width:2.6em;height:2.6em;border-radius:0.6em;background:#FCEEEC;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.55em;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="shield" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;margin-bottom:0.4em;">Constraint</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Boundaries up front. Don't break them.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.85em 1em;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(196,136,26,0.15);border-top:5px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="width:2.6em;height:2.6em;border-radius:0.6em;background:#FEF5E7;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.55em;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="circle-check-big" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;margin-bottom:0.4em;">Validation</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Match output against criteria.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.85em 1em;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(212,95,71,0.15);border-top:5px solid #E0826E;">
   <div style="width:2.6em;height:2.6em;border-radius:0.6em;background:#FCF1EE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.55em;color:#E0826E;"><i data-lucide="rotate-ccw" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#E0826E;margin-bottom:0.4em;">Recovery</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">After failure: rewind, retry, plan again.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
